title: Candle Wicks, 200 Pcs 10cm Pre-Waxed Cotton Wicks for Candle Making, Suitable for Soy, Paraffin, Palm and Scented Wax Blends, Ideal for DIY Candle Projects in Various Containers
features: Premium Candle Wicks: Made from high-quality pre-waxed cotton, these candle wicks ensure consistent burning performance; Suitable for various wax types including soy, paraffin, palm, and scented wax blends
Versatile Use: Ideal for DIY candle making projects; These candle wicks are compatible with different containers like tea cups, coffee mugs, and jars, allowing for personalized candle creations

Optimal Length: Each candle wick measures 10 cm, providing the perfect size for most candle making needs; Each wick is meticulously designed to maintain stability, ensuring no more uneven burns or disappointing results so you can craft candles that glow steadily and beautifully, adding warmth and comfort to your home environment.
Reliable Performance: The candle wick holder designed for steady and even burning; The cotton material promotes a clean burn, making these wicks a dependable choice for candle enthusiasts
Great Value Pack: Includes 200 pieces of candle wicks, offering ample supply for multiple projects; Perfect for both beginners and experienced candle makers looking for quality supplies
description: Enhance your candle making experience with our premium candle wicks. Designed for versatility, these 10 cm pre-waxed cotton wicks are perfect for various wax types, including soy, paraffin, palm, and scented blends. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced candle maker, these wicks provide consistent performance and ease of use. Each wick is crafted to ensure a steady and even burn, making them ideal for DIY projects. The package includes 200 pieces, offering great value for your crafting needs. Use them in different containers like tea cups, coffee mugs, and jars to create personalized candles for any occasion.
